description: Reference field values for creating Watch documents in Sanity Studio. Upload primary image (required) and optional gallery in the UI—asset refs cannot be pasted as plain URLs here.

watches.name: Vanguard Skeleton
watches.description: An exquisite masterwork of horological architecture. The Vanguard Skeleton features an intricate, open-worked dial that meticulously unveils the silent, synchronized dance of precision engineering.

watches.name: Heritage Chrono 1954
watches.description: A faithful recreation of our most iconic mid-century chronograph.

watches.name: Lumina GMT
watches.description: A modern traveler's companion featuring a dual-time zone complication.
